title: Create Potato
description: A lightweight vanilla Create modpack with needed utility designed for smooth performance on low-end PCs. Experience the latest Create Mod in its purest form!
body:
# 🥔 Create Potato

A simple Minecraft Create modpack that focuses on performance and utility.

![Up to 100% more FPS on Low-End PCs (12 Chunks)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c175e745dcf2d14340c8b0f0140990e6c8dcc87d.png)
*Up to 100% more FPS on Low-End PCs (12 Chunks), performance tested on integrated graphics (Ryzen 5 4500U, Vega 6).*

---

## 🚀 Performance
**Create Potato** ensures an optimized and smooth playing experience across all devices. Faster load times, more efficient chunk-loading and an overall smoother experience, allowing for more Creating!

## 🛠️ Utility
Create Potato includes a number of utility mods that make the overall playing experience more comfortable. These are:
* **Full Brightness Toggle (G)**
* **EMI (+EMI Enchanting, EMI Loot, EMI Ores and JEI)**
* **Mouse Tweaks** (please refer to mod page for details)
* **Xaero's Minimap**
* **Xaero's World Map (M)**

> [!NOTE]
> These mods are all client-side and **DO NOT AFFECT performance**.

## 🎨 Shaders & Resource Packs
Thanks to **Iris Shaders** and **Continuity**, this modpack supports shaders and resourcepacks. This allows for better performance even on high-end PCs.

![Patrix 32x + Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e86d0b6393e4a9a5fd55332a9c605a7036ba4e14_0.webp)
*Patrix 32x + Complementary Shaders - Reimagined*

---

## ❤️ Thank You!
I would like to extend a huge thank you to all the amazing mod developers whose hard work and creativity made this modpack possible. Your contributions bring incredible depth, innovation, and fun to the game, and we are deeply grateful for everything you do.

A full list of credits, including all mod authors and licenses, can be found in the provided file named **!CREDITS** inside the modpack files.

**Special thanks** to **simibubi** and contributors behind **Create**, whose groundbreaking work has revolutionized technical Minecraft mods. Your imagination and dedication continue to inspire the entire community!

Thank you again — this modpack wouldn't exist without you!

---
